title: Dead Letter Queue Entry
description: Stores documents that failed processing for later retry or analysis

status.description: HTTP status code from the failed request

error.description: Error message from the failed request

reason.description: Machine-readable error classification. RDBMS classes: constraint_violation, data_type, syntax_or_schema, table_not_found, auth_failure, invalid_database, read_only, connection, timeout, deadlock, lock_contention, resource_exhaustion, server_shutdown, serialization. HTTP classes: bad_request, auth_failure, conflict, gone, method_or_media, payload_too_large, not_found, client_timeout, rate_limited, service_unavailable, bad_gateway, gateway_timeout, server_permanent:{status}, client_error:{status}. Other: connection_failure, shutdown_inflight, redirect:{status}, unknown.

error_class.description: Structured error class from the output forwarder (e.g., 'table_not_found', 'rate_limited', 'constraint_violation'). Same value as reason when available.

time.description: Unix timestamp when entry was created

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when entry should auto-delete (0 = no expiry)

retried.description: Whether this entry has been retried
